name: web-interface-guidelines
description: Shared web interface guideline skills for UI implementation and review

interface.shortDescription: Apply and review shared UI guidelines
interface.longDescription: Use shared skills to apply web interface guidelines during implementation and to audit existing UI against the same standards.
defaultPrompt: Use $web-interface-guidelines-apply to update this UI with the shared guidelines.
Use $web-interface-guidelines-review to audit this UI against the shared guidelines.
